target_audience.details: Primary nominators: older male truck drivers (45-65+). Acquisition targets: nominated peers. Broader driver community for cultural seeding content. Mobile-first mandatory. Audience is less comfortable with social tagging — messaging must feel like respect/status, not marketing.

campaign_goal.primary_goal: Identity acquisition and referral engine. Convert engaged drivers into recruiters via archetype content → nomination → app signup → referral loop. Double-sided rewards outperform single-sided.

key_messages: Every driver has a type — Pit Stop King, Night Owl, Road Scholar — and your archetype deserves recognition.
Real ones recognize real ones. Name your first-round pick and give a pro his flowers.
Tell Lulu who belongs on your Top 10, get shareable content back instantly, and your crew gets the credit they earned.

cta.text: Name your first-round pick — tell Lulu who's on your Top 10.
cta.lead_capture_point: Lulu conversational flow (driver tells Lulu a name + contact → Lulu generates referral messaging + shareable link + attribution). Wired into upgrade intake form so Top 10 enrollment is offered at profile upgrade.

budget.notes: 3 archetype videos complete. 7 more planned — production credits needed for remaining archetypes. Budget TBD pending App V2 build timeline.

creative_assets: Top 10 Truckers White Paper — Strategic framework doc
Nomination card templates — NEEDED (template-based shareable graphics generated by Lulu)
SMS copy variants — NEEDED (referral messaging for outbound sharing)

plan.strategic_context: NOT a content play — it's a FUNNEL play. Driver identity acquisition funnel: archetype content → nomination → app signup → referral engine. Cultural seeding phase builds archetype identity content that makes drivers feel seen and recognized. Nomination mechanic leverages peer respect to drive organic signups. BLOCKER: App V2 build completion required for nomination system.

organic_plan_90_day.weekly_focus_notes: Phase 1 (Weeks 1-4): Cultural Seeding — retarget with 3 completed archetype videos (Pit Stop King, Night Owl, Road Scholar). Build engagement around archetype identity. Phase 2 (Weeks 5-8): Archetype Expansion — release remaining 7 archetype videos as they are produced. Each archetype becomes its own mini-campaign. Phase 3 (Weeks 9-12): Nomination Activation — launch Lulu Top 10 flow, wire into upgrade intake form, activate nomination-to-referral loop. Dependent on App V2 completion.

notes: This is a FUNNEL play, not a content play. Archetype content is the top-of-funnel identity hook.
Simplified flow (Feb 25): Driver tells Lulu a name + contact. Lulu generates referral messaging + shareable link + attribution. No app navigation. No nomination form.
Shareable content is what converts — Lulu generates it automatically.
Draft Day sports framing gives older men permission to tag/nominate without it feeling like social media behavior.
Double-sided rewards outperform single-sided — build reward structure into nomination flow.
